nasb.text: for the Lord your God is the one who goes with you, to fight for you against your enemies, to save you.’

esv.text: for the Lord your God is he who goes with you to fight for you against your enemies, to give you the victory.’

cnv.text: 因為耶和華你們的　神和你們同去，要為你們攻打你們的仇敵，要拯救你們。’

ccb.text: 因为你们的上帝耶和华要与你们同去，为你们争战，使你们得胜。’
